logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output text/plain --- "📊 INITIAL ROWS: $(vars.initialCount default '0') | ✂️ AFTER FILTER: $(vars.totalItems default '0')"]
#[%dw 2.0 output text/plain --- "✅ SUCCESS ($(vars.counter default '0')/$(vars.totalItems default '0')): $(vars.itemName default 'Unknown')"]
#[%dw 2.0 output text/plain --- "🏁 Sync Finished! Total Items Processed: $(vars.totalItems default '0')"]
